<!--
Thanks for contributing to antigen!

The project is in design phase. Until v0.1 ships, the most valuable PRs are:
- Documentation typo fixes
- Clear improvements to design substrate documents
- Glossary additions for new terminology

Code PRs against the placeholder crates are unlikely to land — please discuss design
in an issue first if you want to propose substantive code changes.
-->

<!-- Brief summary -->

<!-- What problem does it solve? Reference any relevant issues. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation (typo, clarification, addition)
- [ ] Design substrate refinement (a doc in `docs/expedition/`)
- [ ] Glossary update
- [ ] CI / repo-hygiene change
- [ ] Code change (please confirm: have you discussed in an issue first?)
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## ADR impact

<!-- Does this PR touch any of the foundational ADRs (1-8)?
     Foundational ADRs require explicit team-lead ratification for amendments.
     If you're proposing an amendment, link the discussion issue. -->

- [ ] No ADR impact
- [ ] Touches existing ADR (which one): ____
- [ ] Proposes new ADR

## Has this been discussed?

<!-- Link to the issue / discussion where this was proposed.
     For doc-only PRs (typos, clarifications), no discussion is needed. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have read the relevant design substrate documents
- [ ] I have updated `docs/glossary.md` if new terminology is introduced
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` if appropriate
- [ ] CI passes (will be checked automatically)
